name: OmniBox International Confidential Business Plan
description: OmniBox International's confidential August 1997 business plan details a Delaware holding company seeking $10 million to deploy a global interactive broadcasting network offering e-commerce, digital set-top boxes, satellite content delivery, and transaction processing across 53+ countries. The plan projects revenues of $201.5M in Year 1 growing to $1.17B by Year 4, based on subscription fees, pay-per-view, digital music (Satellite JukeBox), and home shopping (MailBox). Aberdeen Group's Peter Kastner is referenced as a contributor via an attached Aberdeen Group Profile.
